prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "9B. Other Information" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 15. Exhibits, Financial Statement Schedules".
First find the bottom edge of Item 9B's text:
- If the "Item 15" heading is visible on this page, the bottom edge is the line directly ABOVE it.
- Otherwise the bottom edge is the very last line of text on the page.
Starting from that bottom edge and reading UPWARD, transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of Item 9B — the lines physically closest to the bottom edge. Do NOT return lines from the top or middle of the page, and ignore any bulleted summary list higher up. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
